ddls:
CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census record */,
  "state" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "county" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population count */,
  "men" INTEGER /* Number of men in the population */,
  "women" INTEGER /* Number of women in the population */,
  "hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic individuals */,
  "white" REAL /* Percentage of White individuals */,
  "black" REAL /* Percentage of Black individuals */,
  "native" REAL /* Percentage of Native individuals */,
  "asian" REAL /* Percentage of Asian individuals */,
  "pacific" REAL /* Percentage of Pacific individuals */,
  "citizen" REAL /* Percentage of citizens */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Median household income */,
  "income_err" INTEGER /* Income error estimate */,
  "income_per_cap" REAL /* Income per capita */,
  "income_per_cap_err" INTEGER /* Income per capita error estimate */,
  "poverty" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "child_poverty" REAL /* Child poverty rate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the census data */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the county */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average number of people per household */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Percentage of the population with different education levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_data" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census record */,
  "income_type" TEXT /* Type of income (e.g., median, per capita) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the income statistic */,
  "income_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the income category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the income data */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Source of income (e.g., wages, investments, government assistance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_data_income_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_category_id") REFERENCES income_categories ("income_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_data_census_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_id") REFERENCES census_data ("census_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census record */,
  "employed" REAL /* Percentage of employed individuals */,
  "unemployed" REAL /* Percentage of unemployed individuals */,
  "private_work" REAL /* Percentage of individuals working in private sector */,
  "public_work" REAL /* Percentage of individuals working in public sector */,
  "self_employed" REAL /* Percentage of self-employed individuals */,
  "family_work" REAL /* Percentage of family workers */,
  "employment_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the employment data */,
  "average_hours_worked" REAL /* Average hours worked per week */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_employment_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_category_id") REFERENCES employment_categories ("employment_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_census_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_id") REFERENCES census_data ("census_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_data" (
  "transportation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation record */,
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census record */,
  "drive" REAL /* Percentage of individuals driving to work */,
  "carpool" REAL /* Percentage of individuals carpooling */,
  "transit" REAL /* Percentage of individuals using public transit */,
  "walk" REAL /* Percentage of individuals walking to work */,
  "other_transport" REAL /* Percentage using other transportation methods */,
  "work_at_home" REAL /* Percentage of individuals working from home */,
  "mean_commute" REAL /* Mean commute time in minutes */,
  "transportation_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transportation category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the transportation data */,
  "commute_distance" REAL /* Average commute distance in miles */,
  "public_transit_accessibility" REAL /* Percentage of population with access to public transit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transportation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_data_census_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_id") REFERENCES census_data ("census_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_data_transportation_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("transportation_category_id") REFERENCES transportation_categories ("transportation_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average number of people per household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the state */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average number of people per household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic category */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Number of individuals in the category */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_data" (
  "poverty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poverty record */,
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census record */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of individuals living in poverty */,
  "child_poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of children living in poverty */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the poverty data */,
  "poverty_threshold" INTEGER /* Income threshold used to determine poverty status */,
  "household_size" REAL /* Average household size of those in poverty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poverty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poverty_data_census_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_id") REFERENCES census_data ("census_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_categories" (
  "income_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the income category (e.g., Low, Middle, High) */,
  "min_income" INTEGER /* Minimum income for the category */,
  "max_income" INTEGER /* Maximum income for the category */,
  "percentage_of_population" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the income category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the income category data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_categories" (
  "employment_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment category (e.g., Full-time, Part-time) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment category */,
  "percentage_of_population" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the employment category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the employment category data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_categories" (
  "transportation_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the transportation category (e.g., Drive, Walk) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transportation category */,
  "percentage_of_population" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the transportation category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the transportation category data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transportation_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "census_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the record */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP request method (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_census_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_id") REFERENCES census_data ("census_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
